title: mylinum
intro: Mylinum, also known as Mylabris, is a plant species in the Meloidae family, commonly referred to as the blister beetles. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mylinum include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Mylinum is often prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules or tinctures, and can also be used as a topical application in the form of ointments or creams.
